meaning: Tone for an entity, not just the whole document
common_inputs: Keyword polarity, grammar, negation, ML classifier
pitfall: Document sentiment can differ by company

meaning: How central the company is to the article
common_inputs: Headline mention, mention count, article length, total firms
pitfall: Synonyms and company aliases must be mapped

meaning: Whether this is new or a repeat of an already reported event
common_inputs: Similarity to linked historical articles within/across feeds
pitfall: Repeated alerts can trigger duplicate trades

meaning: Expected price importance of the news category
common_inputs: Event type, article volume, social volume
pitfall: High sentiment without impact may not trade well

meaning: Quality threshold for trading news signals
common_inputs: High sentiment/relevance threshold, hedged long-short book
pitfall: More news is not automatically better
